lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Aye, top o' th' mornin' to ya! Are ye wantin' help with th' tool store?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you sunbathing up a mountain?

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: We tool leprechauns work hard, that we do. An' nary a penny do we get in return. So ye cannae begrudge me mah holiday an' a wee drink or twelve!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, very nice, but why are you sunbathing up a mountain? Surely a beach would be more appropriate?

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Ahh, but I likes th' ruggedy mountain, ye see. Also, I ha' a terrible allergy to sand.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: So were ye wantin' help with th' tool store?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'll keep hold of my stuff.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Ye must be dafter than ye look if ye likes luggin' yer tools everywhere ye goes!

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Ach! Can ye no' leave a body to ha' a little peace? Very well, I have a bit o' stuff to trade with ye. But don't be expectin' yerself any discounts.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Aye, top o' th' mornin' to ya! Are ye wantin' help with th' tool store?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you going to move that other deckchair?

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: An' get ambushed by that damn bird again? Nae, I'll be keeping my distance, thank ye very much!

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Plus, if ye've got a farmin' patch up 'ere, th' union boys'll want me posted nearer it.

sections.title: Using any item other than a tiny fish on Larry

lines.speaker: Larry Leprechaun
lines.text: I'm not one of them farmin' leprechauns! I don't want yer garbage!
